SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo

Class MeteoFilters

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo.MeteoFilters
public final class MeteoFilters extends Object
Constructeurs des MessageFilterI utilisés par les abonnés météo.

Centraliser ici la composition des filtres applicatifs respecte le principe DRY : les noms de propriétés ne sont jamais dupliqués comme littéraux dans les composants ou les démos, et tout filtre métier passe par cette fabrique.

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MessageFilterI
    alertWithLevelAtLeastByName(String minimumLevelName)
    Filter accepting alerts whose MeteoProperties.LEVEL is at least the provided minimum (string-comparison on the level name; works because MeteoAlertI.Level names are alphabetically meaningful for the existing demo, but callers should prefer atLeastAlertLevel(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI.Level) when comparing on the enum directly).
    static MessageFilterI
    anyAlert()
    Filter accepting any meteo alert message.
    static MessageFilterI
    anyWind()
    Filter accepting any wind message regardless of position.
    static MessageFilterI
    atLeastAlertLevel(MeteoAlertI.Level minimum)
    Convenience overload taking the MeteoAlertI.Level enum.
    static MessageFilterI
    windWithinDistance(PositionI reference, double maxDistance)
    Filter accepting wind messages whose MeteoProperties.PAYLOAD is within maxDistance of reference.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      public static MessageFilterI alertWithLevelAtLeastByName(String minimumLevelName)
      Filter accepting alerts whose MeteoProperties.LEVEL is at least the provided minimum (string-comparison on the level name; works because MeteoAlertI.Level names are alphabetically meaningful for the existing demo, but callers should prefer atLeastAlertLevel(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI.Level) when comparing on the enum directly).

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
